prob_desc_input_spec: A single line with a positive integer $$$k$$$ ($$$1 \leq k \leq 10\,000$$$).
prob_desc_notes: NoteThe first perfect integer is $$$19$$$ and the second one is $$$28$$$.
prob_desc_output_spec: A single number, denoting the $$$k$$$-th smallest perfect integer.
prob_desc_description: We consider a positive integer perfect, if and only if the sum of its digits is exactly $$$10$$$. Given a positive integer $$$k$$$, your task is to find the $$$k$$$-th smallest perfect positive integer.
